name: QuickMail

auth.notes: API V2 is GraphQL. Send the raw API key in the Authorization header without a Bearer prefix; the agency plan must have API access enabled.

rateLimits: Rate limits are enforced per agency. Every response includes X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, and X-RateLimit-Reset; excess requests return HTTP 429.
pagination: GraphQL list fields return Relay-style connections with first and after. Many list queries also support skip; the server enforces a maximum page size.
notes: API V2 exposes a single GraphQL endpoint at https://api.quickmail.com/v2/graphql and an interactive GraphiQL endpoint at /v2/graphiql.
Official docs cover campaign creation, email and LinkedIn step mutations, lead creation/deletion, tags, custom properties, campaign automation, and email-account assignment.
